examples: The US President Richard Nixon paid an official visit to China, during which Sino-US joint communique was issued in Shanghai.
December 16, 1978: China and the US issued a joint communique which called for the establishment of diplomatic relations between the two countries on January 1, 1979.
The communique was a watered-down version of what the British had hoped to achieve.
The Talbott Communique is most noteworthy, however, for the emphasis it places on the ABM Treaty.
